results.title: Mirror of Germany. No. 219 = Deutschland Spiegel
results.brief_description:
Episode of Series “Mirror of Germany. The German Scene = Deutschland Spiegel”.
Magazine items: Polo in Hamburg; elections for the 7th German Bundestag and a win for the Social Democrats; a trip on the Rhine, and a look at the wine growing districts; Festival Week in Berlin; the Berlin Six Hour race for boats on The Havel.

results.title: Mirror of Germany. No. 218 = Deutschland Spiegel
results.brief_description:
Episode of Series “Mirror of Germany. The German Scene = Deutschland Spiegel”.
Magazine items: Naval cadets on the training ship “Gorch Fock” one of the few remaining windjammers; parade of windjammers off the Baltic coast; Bonn, ancient Rhineland town popular with press correspondents; Berlin - testing ground for new educational and teaching methods; Lucas Cranach 16th Century German artist; Formula Super “V” motor racing at Hockenhem.

results.brief_description:
Episode of Series “Mirror of Germany. The German Scene = Deutschland Spiegel”.
Magazine items: The 1972 Olympic Games held in Munich - some highlights of the sporting events; swimming, sprinting, pole-vaulting, canoeing, yachting are shown; Munich as the Olympic city; the disastrous Israeli murders by Palestinian terrorists and resulting suspension of the Games for 24 hours; the Games recommence and some final sporting events are shown in a less festive mood and the closing ceremony.
